steps.title: Use the availability contrast
steps.content: The sentence contrasts the game's original distribution with its current online availability. Because it was an underground protest game in an authoritarian regime, the original distribution was likely hidden rather than openly accessible.

steps.title: Reject irrelevant adverbs
steps.content: Choice A means without emotion, Choice B means dishonestly or insincerely, and Choice D means briefly. None describes covert distribution. The needed word means secretly or stealthily. The answer is C.
